SyncProfile.title: SyncProfile
SyncProfile.description: User synchronized trading data including settings, history, and active daily state.

lastSyncTime.description: The timestamp of the last database synchronization.

dailyState.description: The active daily trading state of the current session.

history.description: The archived history of completed trading daily records.

settings.description: The user settings, system configurations, and strategy rules.

/sync_profiles/{syncKey}.description: Stores user synchronized profiles mapped by their private unique sync keys.
